text1:
Modified in absolute secrecy from the already ambitious Executor platform, this midnight-hued monolith represents a severe, unsanctioned divergence from the Supreme Executor's publicly available teaching upon military doctrine. A close inspection of the hull reveals a chillingly professional overhaul. Though outwardly visually extremely similar to the Executor, the notoriously hazardous internal wiring features are absent, and the entire ship has been wired to a highly experimental temporal core, the statistically significant spike in leukemia within its crew considered well-worth the additional tactical capabilities brought to bear upon those who fall out of the Lion's Favor.

An unholy mix of highly experimental and surely unsafe, bleeding edge technologies, The Black Lion prowls the twilight fringes of Askonia, but for what? And if this ship was dreamt upon beyond the dreams of the Supreme Executor, to whom does the Black Lion and its roaming pack answer to?
